# Banner — Prompt de geração

A imagem `banner.png` foi gerada com **Google Gemini**, usando a opção de estilo **"Ciborgue"**.

## Prompt utilizado

```
Ultra-wide sci-fi banner (8:3 landscape aspect ratio). Dark deep navy background (#080d1a), 
cyberpunk futuristic aesthetic with hexagonal grid patterns and circuit lines subtly visible 
in the corners.

LEFT HALF — labeled "SOLO" in thin glowing text at the top:
A single cyborg figure standing centrally, their body and visor fragmented into four color zones — 
electric blue (#4f6ef7), violet (#7c3aed), purple (#a855f7), and emerald green (#10b981) — 
representing four roles simultaneously. Four holographic floating panels orbit around them, 
each glowing in one of the four colors, each with a small role icon (blueprint, document, 
color palette, terminal). Neural data lines converge from the panels into the cyborg. 
The cyborg radiates all four colors as if absorbing every role.

CENTER — a vertical column of AI energy: a glowing strand of neural network or digital DNA 
separating the two halves, electric blue-to-purple gradient, particles flowing upward.

RIGHT HALF — labeled "TIME" in thin glowing text at the top:
Four distinct cyborg figures standing side by side, each with a strong aura glow matching their 
role color: Architect (electric blue), Analyst (violet), Designer (purple), Engineer (emerald green). 
Each cyborg holds or displays their role symbol (architectural diagram, business document, 
UI wireframe, code terminal). Thin neural network lines connect them in a web of collaboration. 
They face forward with a sense of unified purpose.

Overall atmosphere: blue and purple neon glow, floating data particles, holographic overlays, 
deep dark navy gradient background fading to near-black at edges. No text in the image other 
than "SOLO" and "TIME" labels. Cinematic lighting, high detail, professional sci-fi concept art style.
```
